title: Notto Sexaroid Eurie!

alternative_titles.ja: のっと・せくさろいど・エウリィ!

synopsis: Sexual crimes committed by men are on the rise worldwide. To combat them and ensure the safety of the population, "Sexaroids" female robots designed for sexual purposes have been deployed. Eurie, one of these Sexaroids, is sent on a solo mission to Tengestu, a region where sexual crimes have reached extremely high levels. Eurie's goal was to protect men from danger, but she ends up helping them fulfill their needs...
